title: YouTube Poop: Uncle Phil Gives Birth to Will
description:
UPDATE 9/22/2011

http://cl.ly/373U271I0M2P2l3R1b18

this video is so horrible i don't even know why i'm bothering to write this,

this is not a repost.

this is not "stolen."

this is not a reupload from a closed account.

this is the original upload of this video from when i made it on vacation 3 years ago. it disappeared for a while because i got suspended for almost an entire year. when i finally decided to dispute it, i got my account and all of my videos back, including this little pustule that i apparently used to think was funny.

also, if you're out of the loop, kroboproductions is now dikekike. if you don't believe me, ask him yourself
